case_title: LEONARD LEVY VS. ANDY HARVEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVY, LEONARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARVEY, ANDY ANDY HARVEY ENTERPRISES, A SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $26,151.08 PRINCIPAL, $14.93 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $26,616.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
